nasb.text: So Abraham rose early in the morning and took bread and a skin of water and gave them to Hagar, putting them on her shoulder, and gave her the boy, and sent her away. And she departed and wandered about in the wilderness of Beersheba.

esv.text: So Abraham rose early in the morning and took bread and a skin of water and gave it to Hagar, putting it on her shoulder, along with the child, and sent her away. And she departed and wandered in the wilderness of Beersheba.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕清早起來，拿餅和一皮袋水，給了夏甲，放在她的肩膀上，又把孩子交給她，就打發她離開。夏甲走了，在別是巴的曠野飄蕩。

ccb.text: 第二天，亚伯拉罕清早起来，把食物和一皮袋水放在夏甲肩上，让她和孩子离开。夏甲在别示巴的旷野流浪。

csbs.text: 于是亚伯拉罕清早起来，拿了饼和一皮袋水，交给夏甲，放在她的肩膀上，又把孩子交给了她，然后送她走。她就走了，在比尔-谢巴的旷野中漂流。
